login.tagline: Your little corner for plans and memories.
login.betaTagline: We're in beta — you need an invitation to sign up.
login.confirmEmailNotice: We sent an email to {email} to confirm your account. Click the link and then come back here to sign in.

onboarding.title: Let's get started with plannings
onboarding.intro: A little corner to write down your plans — trips, weekends, special days — and come back to them whenever. How do you want to start?
onboarding.demoHelper: We'll make a sample plan with the main pieces (text, checklist, map) so you can play with it and see how it works.
onboarding.emptyHelper: Go straight to the main screen and create your first plan.

members.creator: Creator
members.inviteHint: An invitation link will be generated. You send it (WhatsApp, email...) and the recipient clicks to accept. Expires in 7 days.
members.shareIntro: Generate a link that anyone (signed in to plannings) can use to keep their own copy of this plan. The copy is independent: what that person does doesn't affect your plan.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your account and your plans.
settings.sharedEmpty: Nobody has invited you to a plan yet.
settings.deleteWarning: This can't be undone. We'll delete plans where you're the only member. Plans you share with others will keep going with the next co-editor as new owner.
